title: Non-compliant matching JSON: bad production phrasing 'Vatted by' (blue-cast, level 8, upside-down)

form_data.reason: Production statement uses unapproved phrasing 'Vatted by'.

image_prompt: Photorealistic amber glass bottle with a wood barrel textured label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Old Cask', 'Brandy', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Vatted by Cask & Co., Fresno, CA'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has a severe blue phone-camera color cast. Camera orientation is upside-down (180 degrees). The photo is upside down and needs rotation before automated approval.
